items.name: CIT@CTF
items.body: Five-category jeopardy CTF hosted by the Cyber-CIT collegiate club. Solid performance across web and OSINT tracks.

items.name: Hack The Madness 2026
items.body: Led UTSA's 1337 F0SS BR0K3RS roster during Hack The Box's Hack The Madness 2026 and advanced to the Sweet 16.

items.name: UND CyberHawks Finals
items.body: Finalist in the UND CyberHawks National CTF. Covered web hacking, cryptography, reverse engineering, and binary exploitation. Highlights: static + dynamic malware analysis deobfuscating VBS scripts dropped by a binary, and bypassing a PHP command blacklist in a web app's search parameter.

items.name: CPTC
items.sub: Collegiate Penetration Testing Competition · UTSA NetRunners
items.body: Team member on UTSA NetRunners for the Collegiate Penetration Testing Competition. Linux + web track. Delivered a full pentest report with executive briefings, remediation guidance, and collaborative reporting.

items.name: UTSA IoT Pen Testing
items.sub: UTSA IoT Penetration Testing · Team Captain
items.body: Led a small-scale penetration test with a professional report. Chained common AD attacks (Kerberoasting), used BloodHound to enumerate ACL misconfigurations, and gained command execution via a web search parameter to land shells on the Linux targets.
Incoming Falcon Complete intern focused on real-world alert triage, investigation workflows, and customer-facing response operations.
Surveyed commercial sites, deployed cellular extenders, and installed CAT5e, fiber, phone lines, and network hardware to keep enterprise clients online. Austin, TX / San Antonio, TX.
Troubleshot 30+ complex cases a day across macOS/iOS, coached customers on account hardening, and partnered with cross-functional teams to drive a 45% faster resolution time and 100% CSAT. Remote.
Ran phishing simulations, built Splunk/SOAR automations, and tuned perimeter controls (Fortinet, Palo Alto, Cisco) to harden statewide infrastructure. Austin, TX.

items.name: HTB Mini Pro Lab · Full House

education.school: The University of Texas at San Antonio
